verses.latin_vulgate: Alleluja.   Confitemini Domino, quoniam bonus,  quoniam in sæculum misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַ֥לְלוּ־יָ֨הּ ׀ הוֹד֣וּ לַיהֹוָ֣ה כִּי־ט֑וֹב כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Give glory to the Lord, for he is good: for his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Halleluja. Kiittäkäät Herraa! sillä hän on hyvä, ja hänen laupiutensa pysyy ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: Praise ye the Lord. O give thanks unto the Lord; for he is good: for his mercy endureth for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quis loquetur potentias Domini ;  auditas faciet omnes laudes ejus ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִ֗י יְ֭מַלֵּל גְּבוּר֣וֹת יְהֹוָ֑ה יַ֝שְׁמִ֗יעַ כׇּל־תְּהִלָּתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who shall declare the powers of the Lord? who shall set forth all his praises?
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuka taitaa puhua ulos Herran suurta voimaa, ja ylistää kaikkia hänen kiitettäviä tekojansa?
verses.king_james: Who can utter the mighty acts of the Lord? who can shew forth all his praise?

verses.latin_vulgate: Beati qui custodiunt judicium,  et faciunt justitiam in omni tempore.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֭שְׁרֵי שֹׁמְרֵ֣י מִשְׁפָּ֑ט עֹשֵׂ֖ה צְדָקָ֣ה בְכׇל־עֵֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed are they that keep judgment, and do justice at all times.
verses.finnish_biblia: Autuaat ovat, jotka käskyn pitävät ja aina vanhurskauden tekevät.
verses.king_james: Blessed are they that keep judgment, and he that doeth righteousness at all times.

verses.latin_vulgate: Memento nostri, Domine, in beneplacito populi tui ;  visita nos in salutari tuo :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זׇכְרֵ֣נִי יְ֭הֹוָה בִּרְצ֣וֹן עַמֶּ֑ךָ פׇּ֝קְדֵ֗נִי בִּישׁוּעָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Remember us, O Lord, in the favour of thy people: visit us with thy salvation.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra, muista minua armos perästä, jonkas kansalles luvannut olet: opi minua sinun autuudellas,
verses.king_james: Remember me, O Lord, with the favour that thou bearest unto thy people: O visit me with thy salvation;

verses.latin_vulgate: ad videndum in bonitate electorum tuorum ;  ad lætandum in lætitia gentis tuæ :  ut lauderis cum hæreditate tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִרְא֤וֹת ׀ בְּט֘וֹבַ֤ת בְּחִירֶ֗יךָ לִ֭שְׂמֹחַ בְּשִׂמְחַ֣ת גּוֹיֶ֑ךָ לְ֝הִתְהַלֵּ֗ל עִם־נַחֲלָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: That we may see the good of thy chosen, that we may rejoice in the joy of thy nation: that thou mayst be praised with thy inheritance.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että minä näkisin valittujes menestyksen, ja iloitsisin kansas ilossa, ja kerskaisin perimises kanssa.
verses.king_james: That I may see the good of thy chosen, that I may rejoice in the gladness of thy nation, that I may glory with thine inheritance.

verses.latin_vulgate: Peccavimus cum patribus nostris :  injuste egimus ; iniquitatem fecimus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חָטָ֥אנוּ עִם־אֲבוֹתֵ֗ינוּ הֶעֱוִ֥ינוּ הִרְשָֽׁעְנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: We have sinned with our fathers: we have acted unjustly, we have wrought iniquity.
verses.finnish_biblia: Me teimme syntiä meidän isäimme kanssa: me teimme väärin, ja olemme olleet jumalattomat.
verses.king_james: We have sinned with our fathers, we have committed iniquity, we have done wickedly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Patres nostri in Ægypto non intellexerunt mirabilia tua ;  non fuerunt memores multitudinis misericordiæ tuæ.  Et irritaverunt ascendentes in mare, mare Rubrum ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲב֘וֹתֵ֤ינוּ בְמִצְרַ֨יִם ׀ לֹא־הִשְׂכִּ֬ילוּ נִפְלְאוֹתֶ֗יךָ לֹ֣א זָ֭כְרוּ אֶת־רֹ֣ב חֲסָדֶ֑יךָ וַיַּמְר֖וּ עַל־יָ֣ם בְּיַם־סֽוּף׃
verses.douay_rheims: Our fathers understood not thy wonders in Egypt: they remembered not the multitude of thy mercies: And they provoked to wrath going up to the sea, even the Red Sea.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei meidän isämme tahtoneet ymmärtää Egyptissä sinun ihmeitäs, eikä muistaneet sinun suurta laupiuttas, ja olivat meren tykönä tottelemattomat, Punaisen meren tykönä.
verses.king_james: Our fathers understood not thy wonders in Egypt; they remembered not the multitude of thy mercies; but provoked him at the sea, even at the Red sea.

verses.latin_vulgate: et salvavit eos propter nomen suum,  ut notam faceret potentiam suam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽ֭יּוֹשִׁיעֵם לְמַ֣עַן שְׁמ֑וֹ לְ֝הוֹדִ֗יעַ אֶת־גְּבוּרָתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he saved them for his own name's sake: that he might make his power known.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuitenkin autti hän heitä nimensä tähden, niin että hän voimansa osoitti.
verses.king_james: Nevertheless he saved them for his name’s sake, that he might make his mighty power to be known.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et increpuit mare Rubrum et exsiccatum est,  et deduxit eos in abyssis sicut in deserto.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּגְעַ֣ר בְּיַם־ס֭וּף וַֽיֶּחֱרָ֑ב וַיּוֹלִיכֵ֥ם בַּ֝תְּהֹמ֗וֹת כַּמִּדְבָּֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he rebuked the Red Sea and it was dried up: and he led them through the depths, as in a wilderness.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän uhkasi Punaista merta, niin se kuivui; ja vei heitä syvyyden lävitse, niinkuin korvessa,
verses.king_james: He rebuked the Red sea also, and it was dried up: so he led them through the depths, as through the wilderness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et salvavit eos de manu odientium,  et redemit eos de manu inimici.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽ֭יּוֹשִׁיעֵם מִיַּ֣ד שׂוֹנֵ֑א וַ֝יִּגְאָלֵ֗ם מִיַּ֥ד אוֹיֵֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he saved them from the hand of them that hated them: and he redeemed them from the hand of the enemy.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja vapahti heitä niiden käsistä, joka heitä vihasivat, ja lunasti heitä vihollistensa käsistä.
verses.king_james: And he saved them from the hand of him that hated them, and redeemed them from the hand of the enemy.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et operuit aqua tribulantes eos ;  unus ex eis non remansit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְכַסּוּ־מַ֥יִם צָרֵיהֶ֑ם אֶחָ֥ד מֵ֝הֶ֗ם לֹ֣א נוֹתָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the water covered them that afflicted them: there was not one of them left.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja vedet peittivät heidän vainollisensa, niin ettei yksikään eläväksi jäänyt.
verses.king_james: And the waters covered their enemies: there was not one of them left.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et crediderunt verbis ejus,  et laudaverunt laudem ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּאֲמִ֥ינוּ בִדְבָרָ֑יו יָ֝שִׁ֗ירוּ תְּהִלָּתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they believed his words: and they sang his praises.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin he uskoivat hänen sanansa, ja veisasivat hänen kiitoksensa.
verses.king_james: Then believed they his words; they sang his praise.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cito fecerunt ; obliti sunt operum ejus :  et non sustinuerunt consilium ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִ֭הֲרוּ שָׁכְח֣וּ מַעֲשָׂ֑יו לֹא־חִ֝כּ֗וּ לַעֲצָתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: They had quickly done, they forgot his works: and they waited not for his counsel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta he unohtivat pian hänen työnsä, ja ei ottaneet hänen neuvoansa.
verses.king_james: They soon forgat his works; they waited not for his counsel:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et concupierunt concupiscentiam in deserto,  et tentaverunt Deum in inaquoso.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתְאַוּ֣וּ תַ֭אֲוָה בַּמִּדְבָּ֑ר וַיְנַסּוּ־אֵ֝֗ל בִּישִׁימֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they coveted their desire in the desert: and they tempted God in the place without water.
verses.finnish_biblia: He kiehuivat himosta korvessa, ja kiusasivat Jumalaa erämaassa.
verses.king_james: But lusted exceedingly in the wilderness, and tempted God in the desert.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dedit eis petitionem ipsorum,  et misit saturitatem in animas eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתֵּ֣ן לָ֭הֶם שֶׁאֱלָתָ֑ם וַיְשַׁלַּ֖ח רָז֣וֹן בְּנַפְשָֽׁם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he gave them their request: and sent fulness into their souls.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta hän antoi heille heidän anomisensa, ja lähetti heille laihuuden heidän himonsa tähden.
verses.king_james: And he gave them their request; but sent leanness into their soul.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et irritaverunt Moysen in castris ;  Aaron, sanctum Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְקַנְא֣וּ לְ֭מֹשֶׁה בַּֽמַּחֲנֶ֑ה לְ֝אַהֲרֹ֗ן קְד֣וֹשׁ יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they provoked Moses in the camp, Aaron the holy one of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he asettuivat Mosesta vastaan leirissä, Aaronia Herran pyhää vastaan.
verses.king_james: They envied Moses also in the camp, and Aaron the saint of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Aperta est terra, et deglutivit Dathan,  et operuit super congregationem Abiron.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תִּפְתַּח־אֶ֭רֶץ וַתִּבְלַ֣ע דָּתָ֑ן וַ֝תְּכַ֗ס עַל־עֲדַ֥ת אֲבִירָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The earth opened and swallowed up Dathan: and covered the congregation of Abiron.
verses.finnish_biblia: Maa aukeni ja nieli Datanin, ja peitti Abiramin joukon,
verses.king_james: The earth opened and swallowed up Dathan, and covered the company of Abiram.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et exarsit ignis in synagoga eorum :  flamma combussit peccatores.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּבְעַר־אֵ֥שׁ בַּעֲדָתָ֑ם לֶ֝הָבָ֗ה תְּלַהֵ֥ט רְשָׁעִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And a fire was kindled in their congregation: the flame burned the wicked.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tuli syttyi heidän joukossansa, ja liekki poltti jumalattomat.
verses.king_james: And a fire was kindled in their company; the flame burned up the wicked.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et fecerunt vitulum in Horeb,  et adoraverunt sculptile.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַעֲשׂוּ־עֵ֥גֶל בְּחֹרֵ֑ב וַ֝יִּשְׁתַּחֲו֗וּ לְמַסֵּכָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: They made also a calf in Horeb: and they adored the graven thing.
verses.finnish_biblia: He tekivät vasikan Horebissa, ja kumarsivat valettua kuvaa.
verses.king_james: They made a calf in Horeb, and worshipped the molten image.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et mutaverunt gloriam suam  in similitudinem vituli comedentis fœnum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּמִ֥ירוּ אֶת־כְּבוֹדָ֑ם בְּתַבְנִ֥ית שׁ֝֗וֹר אֹכֵ֥ל עֵֽשֶׂב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they changed their glory into the likeness of a calf that eateth grass.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he muuttelivat kunniansa härjän muotoon, joka heiniä syö.
verses.king_james: Thus they changed their glory into the similitude of an ox that eateth grass.

verses.latin_vulgate: Obliti sunt Deum qui salvavit eos ;  qui fecit magnalia in Ægypto,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁ֭כְחוּ אֵ֣ל מוֹשִׁיעָ֑ם עֹשֶׂ֖ה גְדֹל֣וֹת בְּמִצְרָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: They forgot God, who saved them, who had done great things in Egypt,
verses.finnish_biblia: He unohtivat Jumalan, vapahtajansa, joka oli niin suuria töitä tehnyt Egyptissä,
verses.king_james: They forgat God their saviour, which had done great things in Egypt;

verses.latin_vulgate: mirabilia in terra Cham,  terribilia in mari Rubro.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נִ֭פְלָאוֹת בְּאֶ֣רֶץ חָ֑ם נ֝וֹרָא֗וֹת עַל־יַם־סֽוּף׃
verses.douay_rheims: Wondrous works in the land of Cham: terrible things in the Red Sea.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ihmeitä Hamin maalla, ja peljättäviä töitä Punaisen meren tykönä.
verses.king_james: Wondrous works in the land of Ham, and terrible things by the Red sea.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit ut disperderet eos,  si non Moyses, electus ejus,  stetisset in confractione in conspectu ejus,  ut averteret iram ejus, ne disperderet eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֗אמֶר לְֽהַשְׁמִ֫ידָ֥ם לוּלֵ֡י מֹ֘שֶׁ֤ה בְחִיר֗וֹ עָמַ֣ד בַּפֶּ֣רֶץ לְפָנָ֑יו לְהָשִׁ֥יב חֲ֝מָת֗וֹ מֵהַשְׁחִֽית׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he said that he would destroy them: had not Moses his chosen stood before him in the breach: To turn away his wrath, lest he should destroy them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän sanoi heitä hukuttavansa, ellei Moses hänen valittunsa olisi seisonut siinä välissä, ja palauttanut hänen vihaansa, ettei hän ratki heitä kadottanut.
verses.king_james: Therefore he said that he would destroy them, had not Moses his chosen stood before him in the breach, to turn away his wrath, lest he should destroy them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et pro nihilo habuerunt terram desiderabilem ;  non crediderunt verbo ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽ֭יִּמְאֲסוּ בְּאֶ֣רֶץ חֶמְדָּ֑ה לֹא־הֶ֝אֱמִ֗ינוּ לִדְבָרֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they set at nought the desirable land. They believed not his word,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he katsoivat sen ihanan maan ylön, eikä uskoneet hänen sanaansa,
verses.king_james: Yea, they despised the pleasant land, they believed not his word:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et murmuraverunt in tabernaculis suis ;  non exaudierunt vocem Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּרָגְנ֥וּ בְאׇהֳלֵיהֶ֑ם לֹ֥א שָׁ֝מְע֗וּ בְּק֣וֹל יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they murmured in their tents: they hearkened not to the voice of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja napisivat majoissansa, eikä olleet kuuliaiset Herran äänelle.
verses.king_james: But murmured in their tents, and hearkened not unto the voice of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et elevavit manum suam super eos  ut prosterneret eos in deserto :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשָּׂ֣א יָד֣וֹ לָהֶ֑ם לְהַפִּ֥יל א֝וֹתָ֗ם בַּמִּדְבָּֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he lifted up his hand over them: to overthrow them in the desert;
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän nosti kätensä heitä vastaan, maahan lyödäksensä heitä korvessa,
verses.king_james: Therefore he lifted up his hand against them, to overthrow them in the wilderness:

verses.latin_vulgate: et ut dejiceret semen eorum in nationibus,  et dispergeret eos in regionibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְהַפִּ֣יל זַ֭רְעָם בַּגּוֹיִ֑ם וּ֝לְזָרוֹתָ֗ם בָּאֲרָצֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And to cast down their seed among the nations, and to scatter them in the countries.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja heittääksensä heidän siemenensä pakanain sekaan, ja hajoittaaksensa heitä maakuntiin.
verses.king_james: To overthrow their seed also among the nations, and to scatter them in the lands.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et initiati sunt Beelphegor,  et comederunt sacrificia mortuorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַ֭יִּצָּ֣מְדוּ לְבַ֣עַל פְּע֑וֹר וַ֝יֹּאכְל֗וּ זִבְחֵ֥י מֵתִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: They also were initiated to Beelphegor: and ate the sacrifices of the dead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he ryhtyivät BaalPeoriin, ja söivät kuolleiden (epäjumalain) uhreista,
verses.king_james: They joined themselves also unto Baal–peor, and ate the sacrifices of the dead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et irritaverunt eum in adinventionibus suis,  et multiplicata est in eis ruina.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַ֭יַּכְעִיסוּ בְּמַ֥עַלְלֵיהֶ֑ם וַתִּפְרׇץ־בָּ֝֗ם מַגֵּפָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they provoked him with their inventions: and destruction was multiplied among them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja vihoittivat hänen töillänsä; niin tuli myös rangaistus heidän sekaansa.
verses.king_james: Thus they provoked him to anger with their inventions: and the plague brake in upon them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et stetit Phinees, et placavit,  et cessavit quassatio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעֲמֹ֣ד פִּֽ֭ינְחָס וַיְפַלֵּ֑ל וַ֝תֵּעָצַ֗ר הַמַּגֵּפָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then Phinees stood up, and pacified him: and the slaughter ceased.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Pinehas astui edes, ja lepytti asian, ja rangaistus lakkasi.
verses.king_james: Then stood up Phinehas, and executed judgment: and so the plague was stayed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et reputatum est ei in justitiam,  in generationem et generationem usque in sempiternum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתֵּחָ֣שֶׁב ל֭וֹ לִצְדָקָ֑ה לְדֹ֥ר וָ֝דֹ֗ר עַד־עוֹלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it was reputed to him unto justice, to generation and generation for evermore.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja se luettiin hänelle vanhurskaudeksi, suvusta sukuun ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: And that was counted unto him for righteousness unto all generations for evermore.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et irritaverunt eum ad aquas contradictionis,  et vexatus est Moyses propter eos :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַ֭יַּקְצִיפוּ עַל־מֵ֥י מְרִיבָ֑ה וַיֵּ֥רַע לְ֝מֹשֶׁ֗ה בַּעֲבוּרָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: They provoked him also at the waters of contradiction: and Moses was afflicted for their sakes:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja vihoittivat hänen riitaveden tykönä ja tapahtui Mosekselle pahoin heidän tähtensä;
verses.king_james: They angered him also at the waters of strife, so that it went ill with Moses for their sakes:

verses.latin_vulgate: quia exacerbaverunt spiritum ejus,  et distinxit in labiis suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־הִמְר֥וּ אֶת־רוּח֑וֹ וַ֝יְבַטֵּ֗א בִּשְׂפָתָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because they exasperated his spirit. And he distinguished with his lips.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä he saattivat hänen sydämensä murheelliseksi, niin että hän sanoissansa eksyi.
verses.king_james: Because they provoked his spirit, so that he spake unadvisedly with his lips.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non disperdiderunt gentes  quas dixit Dominus illis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹֽא־הִ֭שְׁמִידוּ אֶת־הָעַמִּ֑ים אֲשֶׁ֤ר אָמַ֖ר יְהֹוָ֣ה לָהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: They did not destroy the nations of which the Lord spoke unto them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei he hukuttaneet pakanoita, niinkuin Herra heille käskenyt oli,
verses.king_james: They did not destroy the nations, concerning whom the Lord commanded them:

verses.latin_vulgate: et commisti sunt inter gentes,  et didicerunt opera eorum ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתְעָרְב֥וּ בַגּוֹיִ֑ם וַֽ֝יִּלְמְד֗וּ מַעֲשֵׂיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they were mingled among the heathens, and learned their works:
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan sekaantuivat pakanain sekaan, ja oppivat heidän töitänsä,
verses.king_james: But were mingled among the heathen, and learned their works.

verses.latin_vulgate: et servierunt sculptilibus eorum,  et factum est illis in scandalum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעַבְד֥וּ אֶת־עֲצַבֵּיהֶ֑ם וַיִּהְי֖וּ לָהֶ֣ם לְמוֹקֵֽשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And served their idols, and it became a stumblingblock to them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja palvelivat heidän epäjumaliansa; ja ne tulivat heille paulaksi.
verses.king_james: And they served their idols: which were a snare unto them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et immolaverunt filios suos et filias suas dæmoniis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּזְבְּח֣וּ אֶת־בְּ֭נֵיהֶם וְאֶת־בְּנוֹתֵיהֶ֗ם לַשֵּׁדִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they sacrificed their sons, and their daughters to devils.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he uhrasivat poikansa ja tyttärensä perkeleille,
verses.king_james: Yea, they sacrificed their sons and their daughters unto devils,

verses.latin_vulgate: Et effuderunt sanguinem innocentem,  sanguinem filiorum suorum et filiarum suarum,  quas sacrificaverunt sculptilibus Chanaan.  Et infecta est terra in sanguinibus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּ֥שְׁפְּכ֨וּ דָ֪ם נָקִ֡י דַּם־בְּנֵ֘יהֶ֤ם וּֽבְנוֹתֵיהֶ֗ם אֲשֶׁ֣ר זִ֭בְּחוּ לַעֲצַבֵּ֣י כְנָ֑עַן וַתֶּחֱנַ֥ף הָ֝אָ֗רֶץ בַּדָּמִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they shed innocent blood: the blood of their sons and of their daughters which they sacrificed to the idols of Chanaan. And the land was polluted with blood,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja vuodattivat viattoman veren, poikainsa ja tyttäriensä veren, jotka he uhrasivat Kanaanealaisten epäjumalille, niin että maa veren vioilla turmeltiin,
verses.king_james: And shed innocent blood, even the blood of their sons and of their daughters, whom they sacrificed unto the idols of Canaan: and the land was polluted with blood.

verses.latin_vulgate: et contaminata est in operibus eorum :  et fornicati sunt in adinventionibus suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּטְמְא֥וּ בְמַעֲשֵׂיהֶ֑ם וַ֝יִּזְנ֗וּ בְּמַ֥עַלְלֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And was defiled with their works: and they went aside after their own inventions.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja saastuttivat itsensä omissa töissänsä, ja tekivät huorin teoissansa.
verses.king_james: Thus were they defiled with their own works, and went a whoring with their own inventions.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et iratus est furore Dominus in populum suum,  et abominatus est hæreditatem suam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּחַר־אַ֣ף יְהֹוָ֣ה בְּעַמּ֑וֹ וַ֝יְתָעֵ֗ב אֶת־נַחֲלָתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord was exceedingly angry with his people: and he abhorred his inheritance.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin julmistui Herran viha kansansa päälle, ja hän kauhistui perimistänsä,
verses.king_james: Therefore was the wrath of the Lord kindled against his people, insomuch that he abhorred his own inheritance.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et tradidit eos in manus gentium ;  et dominati sunt eorum qui oderunt eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתְּנֵ֥ם בְּיַד־גּוֹיִ֑ם וַֽיִּמְשְׁל֥וּ בָ֝הֶ֗ם שֹׂנְאֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he delivered them into the hands of the nations: and they that hated them had dominion over them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hylkäsi ne pakanain käsiin, että ne vallitsivat heitä, jotka heitä vihasivat.
verses.king_james: And he gave them into the hand of the heathen; and they that hated them ruled over them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et tribulaverunt eos inimici eorum,  et humiliati sunt sub manibus eorum ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּלְחָצ֥וּם אוֹיְבֵיהֶ֑ם וַ֝יִּכָּנְע֗וּ תַּ֣חַת יָדָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And their enemies afflicted them: and they were humbled under their hands:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja heidän vihollisensa ahdistivat heitä, ja he painettiin heidän kätensä alle.
verses.king_james: Their enemies also oppressed them, and they were brought into subjection under their hand.

verses.latin_vulgate: sæpe liberavit eos.  Ipsi autem exacerbaverunt eum in consilio suo,  et humiliati sunt in iniquitatibus suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פְּעָמִ֥ים רַבּ֗וֹת יַצִּ֫ילֵ֥ם וְ֭הֵמָּה יַמְר֣וּ בַעֲצָתָ֑ם וַ֝יָּמֹ֗כּוּ בַּעֲוֺנָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Many times did he deliver them. But they provoked him with their counsel: and they were brought low by their iniquities.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän monesti heitä pelasti; mutta he vihoittivat hänen neuvoillansa, ja he painettiin alas pahain tekoinsa tähden.
verses.king_james: Many times did he deliver them; but they provoked him with their counsel, and were brought low for their iniquity.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et vidit cum tribularentur,  et audivit orationem eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַ֭יַּרְא בַּצַּ֣ר לָהֶ֑ם בְּ֝שׇׁמְע֗וֹ אֶת־רִנָּתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he saw when they were in tribulation: and he heard their prayer.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän näki heidän tuskansa, kuin hän heidän valituksensa kuuli,
verses.king_james: Nevertheless he regarded their affliction, when he heard their cry:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et memor fuit testamenti sui,  et pœnituit eum secundum multitudinem misericordiæ suæ :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּזְכֹּ֣ר לָהֶ֣ם בְּרִית֑וֹ וַ֝יִּנָּחֵ֗ם כְּרֹ֣ב חֲסָדָֽו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he was mindful of his covenant: and repented according to the multitude of his mercies.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja muisti liittonsa, jonka hän heidän kanssansa tehnyt oli, ja katui sitä suuresta laupiudestansa,
verses.king_james: And he remembered for them his covenant, and repented according to the multitude of his mercies.

verses.latin_vulgate: et dedit eos in misericordias,  in conspectu omnium qui ceperant eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתֵּ֣ן אוֹתָ֣ם לְרַחֲמִ֑ים לִ֝פְנֵ֗י כׇּל־שׁוֹבֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he gave them unto mercies, in the sight of all those that had made them captives.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja antoi heidän löytää armon kaikkein edessä, jotka heitä vanginneet olivat.
verses.king_james: He made them also to be pitied of all those that carried them captives.

verses.latin_vulgate: Salvos nos fac, Domine Deus noster,  et congrega nos de nationibus :  ut confiteamur nomini sancto tuo,  et gloriemur in laude tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֽוֹשִׁיעֵ֨נוּ ׀ יְ֘הֹוָ֤ה אֱלֹהֵ֗ינוּ וְקַבְּצֵנוּ֮ מִֽן־הַגּ֫וֹיִ֥ם לְ֭הֹדוֹת לְשֵׁ֣ם קׇדְשֶׁ֑ךָ לְ֝הִשְׁתַּבֵּ֗חַ בִּתְהִלָּתֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Save us, O Lord, our God: and gather us from among the nations: That we may give thanks to thy holy name, and may glory in thy praise.
verses.finnish_biblia: Auta meitä, Herra meidän Jumalamme, ja kokoa meitä pakanoista, että kiittäisimme sinun pyhää nimeäs, ja kehuisimme sinun kiitostas.
verses.king_james: Save us, O Lord our God, and gather us from among the heathen, to give thanks unto thy holy name, and to triumph in thy praise.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedictus Dominus Deus Israël, a sæculo et usque in sæculum ;  et dicet omnis populus : Fiat, fiat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּ֤רֽוּךְ־יְהֹוָ֨ה אֱלֹהֵ֪י יִשְׂרָאֵ֡ל מִן־הָ֤עוֹלָ֨ם ׀ וְעַ֬ד הָעוֹלָ֗ם וְאָמַ֖ר כׇּל־הָעָ֥ם אָמֵ֗ן הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed be the Lord the God of Israel, from everlasting to everlasting: and let all the people say: So be it, so be it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kiitetty olkoon Herra Israelin Jumala, ijankaikkisuudesta niin ijankaikkisuuteen: ja sanokaan kaikki kansa: Amen, Halleluja!
verses.king_james: Blessed be the Lord God of Israel from everlasting to everlasting: and let all the people say, Amen. Praise ye the Lord.
